hooks.command:
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "REMINDER: A plan was just approved. You MUST save two documents to the repo before starting implementation:
1. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/YYYY-MM-DD-<topic>.md
2. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/YYYY-MM-DD-<topic>-design.md
Do not begin any implementation work until both files are written."}}'

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | grep -qvE '(__tests__|\.test\.|\.spec\.|jest\.config|node_modules|docs/|\.md$|\.json$|\.css$)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "REMINDER: A source file was just modified. You MUST write or update the corresponding unit test in __tests__/ before moving on to other work. Follow existing test patterns (Jest + React Testing Library). If a test file already exists for this component/module, update it to cover the changes. If no test file exists, create one."}}' || true
